title: Galactic Cantina
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:DSCantina.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The proposed Galactic Cantina.]]
The '''Galactic Cantina''' was a proposed [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] to be built on the surface of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. The cantina had a large green sign towering over the structure that read, in [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]], "Cantina". [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] alike relaxed on their breaks. The bar was high-tech and capable of synthesizing almost any drink in the known [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], as well as over 16,000 well-known recipes. The building also featured a soundstage for live entertainment.<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has stated that, while most items, like the [[supercoaster]] and [[Ferris Wheel]] are entered for fun, much of the other information is included in the [[Holocron continuity database]], and is [[canon]]. Regarding the Galactic Cantina itself, Chee has stated that it is best to consider it non-canon until it resurfaces elsewhere.<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Death Star Designer]]''
